title: Cobblemon Nature Tips
description: Adds easy-to-see indicators for nature stat boosts and drops.
body:
This pack enhances the UI by displaying stat modifiers directly beside each nature’s name, making it easier than ever to tell how each one affects your Pokémon’s stats. No more guessing or checking online you can instantly see which stats are increased or decreased right from the summary screen or the PC.

Each nature now includes a simple visual indicator showing its boosted and lowered stats, designed to blend naturally with the existing interface. It’s lightweight, clean, and doesn’t alter any other parts of the UI, so it fits seamlessly into any setup or modpacks.

![Summary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9b3b91812dac1b08acbbd27a3d1ee612a9579d3.png)
![PC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61ebef8cb956ed13f0c3979470c714e2621d8b45.png)
